meaning: adj.[用于名词后][烹]马伦戈式的,油炸后加西红柿和蘑菇(以及大蒜、葡萄酒等)一起炖的
examples: She signalled a passing taxi and ordered him to take her to the rue Marengo.
Galileo Rock was just a short head behind in third, with Battle of Marengo next to finish.
Take a look at these transaction prices for vintage vehicles sold last month by the Marengo, Ill-based Mecum Auctions at an event in Kissimmee, Fla.
It is not so easy to say what, apart from the often discussed technological and organizational advances, from artillery to drill, separates the carnage of La Rochelle from the carnage of Marengo.
